subcodes.first_line: This missive is sent forth from this sorrowful and grief-stricken servant unto that All-Merciful and Trusted One: O Friend! [3.5s]... ...A race of men, incomparable in character, shall be raised up which, with the feet of detachment, will tread under all who are in heaven and on earth
subcodes.first_line_orig: این نامه از این عبد حزین غمین بشطر حضرت مشفق امین ارسال میشود که ای یار
subcodes.subjects: @return of the Manifestations of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power of prayer
